title: The best way to heal the planet

transcript.text: Hello, this video is what I think about what's the best way to heal the planet, heal the earth.
Now, I think being an environmentalist is a good way to do it.
All the things you can do to be an environmentalist, because the earth physically is dying.
But I think there's actually something that's even more important than being an environmentalist.
Even though the earth is dying, I think there's something that if we were to fix this other thing,
Then it would cause us to be able to be environmentalists more than if we were to just decide to be environmentalists.
Because when it comes down to it, it all comes down to money.
If we had tons of money, then we would have the money to clean up the environment
And, you know, to pay farmers to not cut down the rainforest in Brazil and stuff like this.
And so what I think we should do to, the best thing we can do to heal the planet
Is by exposing bad practices in fucked up countries.
In the axis of evil countries.
Countries like Afghanistan and Iran and North Korea and half the countries in Africa.
Sanctions are good.
But sanctions make it easy for people to go, oh, imperialistic American government.
Because the way that people think in these screwy countries,
Like Iran, or I'm not saying Iran is a screwy, well, yeah, like Iraq when it was in,
Well, these terrorist people, one reason they think that they can say and get away with it saying it to each other
That, you know, America sucks is because we're being imperialists.
Because their idea of a country going in and controlling another country
Is purely out of lust for power and greed and everything.
And, sure, with America there's a great element to that.

Apparently we did go into Iraq.

They had power over the government to make, to force soldiers to do their laundry

And, um, and charge that much to do bad laundry.
So, this kind of thing, it's pretty clear that, yeah, there's definitely an element to that.
But, so, you know, it makes it easier for these people to get away with saying, you know,
I'm evil, we hate America, you hate our American government, all this stuff.
Even though sanctions are good.
Because it's our way of saying, you know, it's not okay to do this kind of thing.
Stop it.
And until you stop that, you know, you give me sanctions.
What I think is superior to that is, um, is to us take control individually.
And I haven't done this.
This is kind of like my mission statement to do it.
My motivation to myself to do this.
We haven't done this.
